name: Intelligence BooM
description: Intelligence BooM is an open source full-stack AI inference platform with 20+ components for LLM deployment, fine-tuning, and agentic workflows on heterogeneous hardware.
releaseNotes: Intelligence BooM 25.11 (Qiaoyu Noodle) empowers domain-specific AI with the pioneering OS-level fine-tuning model and seamless NPU orchestration.
featureList: High-throughput, low-cost inference via convergence and allocation of heterogeneous computing power
50%+ lower TTFT for multi-turn and long-context dialogues via multi-tier caching
AIKG for Ascend: production-ready performance and 5x+ faster Triton operator development
Cost-efficient fine-tuning with Atlas 300 series and 50+ pre-trained models
Seamless Dify integration for out-of-the-box agentic workflows
Decoupled MindSpore graph mode for PyTorch
Co-launched vLLM-omni and LMCache-Ascend through upstream partnerships

name: Intelligence BooM: Open Source AI Inference | openEuler
description: Intelligence BooM is an open source full-stack AI inference platform with 20+ components for LLM deployment, fine-tuning, and agentic workflows on heterogeneous hardware.
